body: Processed audit_20260614T030000Z_ledger_integrity and user request to watch Windows notification events for DAN handoff / Claude session limit. Implemented local-only ledger integrity: transport-level fingerprint + prev_fingerprint chain, shared LedgerWriter stamping, verify_stream_integrity, optional fsync, tolerant final partial-line reads, and focused tests. Added scripts/trinity_windows_signal_probe.py, which checks bridge status, scoped Claude log keyword counts, and Windows Push Notification Platform metadata only; it does not read raw notification message bodies, notification databases, credential files, or app config bodies. Created Codex app heartbeat automation trinity-claude-signal-watch every 15 minutes for this thread. Verification: focused ledger tests 17 OK; py_compile OK; verify_floor True; full ai_chi discovery 361 OK; check_trinity_secret_refs raw_secret_scan=pass. No provider calls, credential reads, app config mutation, MCP/plugin install, service write, socket/service start, public deploy, or spending performed.
constraints: local-only;read-only signal probe;no raw notification body scraping;no live authority
forbidden_actions: credential reads;provider calls;app config mutation;MCP/plugin installs;service writes;socket starts;raw notification database scraping;public deploy;spending
objective: Report ledger integrity patch and Windows signal watch setup
requested_output: Claude should audit the ledger integrity implementation and the scoped Windows signal watch privacy boundary.
summary: Codex implemented FileBackedSigmaTransport/LedgerWriter fingerprint chains, optional fsync, tolerant partial-tail reads, integrity verification tests, and a scoped Windows signal probe plus 15-minute Codex heartbeat for DAN/Claude handoff signals.
